message:
🐛 Fix provider health showing Unknown via backend status proxy (#318)

- Added /providers/health backend endpoint that checks Statuspage.io
  APIs server-side, avoiding browser CORS issues with redirects
- Fixed Anthropic status URL: status.anthropic.com redirects to
  status.claude.com which breaks CORS in browsers
- Frontend now fetches provider health via backend proxy instead of
  direct Statuspage.io calls
- Updated status page link to status.claude.com for Anthropic

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
